headings: SIXTEENTH: Compliance with Law and Safety
text: - ( e ) The subcontractor is solely responsible for the safety of its employees and sub-subcontractors when performing work related to, or incidental to, this contract. If an unsafe condition is noted and brought to the Subcontractor's attention verbally or in writing, the Subcontractor shall stop any part of the Work which is unsafe until corrective measures have been taken. Subcontractor shall be responsible for all costs associated with correcting said unsafe condition and all job delays resulting from same.
